questions.question: What's something your mama used to cook that nobody else could get right?
Was there a dish that always showed up at holidays, no matter what?
Did anybody in your family have a secret recipe they wouldn't share?
What's the best meal you remember eating as a kid?
Did your family sit down together for supper every night?
Who was the best cook in your family growing up?
Was there a food you hated as a kid but love now?
Who was the character in your family? The one who always had everybody laughing?
Was there somebody in your family who could tell a story like nobody else?
Who was the toughest person in your family?
Did you have a favorite aunt or uncle growing up?
Who did everybody go to when they needed advice?
Was there a family member everybody was just a little bit afraid of?
Who in your family could fix just about anything?
What did Christmas morning look like at your house growing up?
Did your family have any holiday traditions that were just yours?
What's the best Thanksgiving you can remember?
Did your family do anything special for the Fourth of July?
Was there a holiday that always seemed to bring everybody together?
Did you ever get a birthday present you'll never forget?
What's a holiday tradition you wish your family still did?
What was your first real job?
What's the one thing your dad always said?
Did you have chores growing up? What was the worst one?
What did you want to be when you grew up?
Was there a teacher who really made a difference in your life?
What's something you learned the hard way?
Did your parents ever tell you something that stuck with you your whole life?
How did you meet your husband or wife?
What was your first date like?
Was there a moment you knew they were the one?
What's the most romantic thing that ever happened to you?
Did your parents approve right away, or did they take some convincing?
What was your wedding day like?
What's the best piece of advice anybody gave you about marriage?
What's something your kids did that you'll never forget?
Was there a moment with your kids that made you the proudest?
What's the funniest thing one of your kids ever said?
Did you raise your kids the same way you were raised, or different?
What was the hardest part about being a parent?
Is there something you always told your kids, kind of like your own saying?
What do you hope your grandkids remember about you?
What was your neighborhood like when you were growing up?
Did you have a best friend as a kid? What did you two get into?
Was there a place in your town where everybody hung out?
Did you ever get in trouble as a kid? What happened?
What games did you play outside when you were little?
Did you know all your neighbors? Were they like family?
What's one thing about your hometown that doesn't exist anymore?
Did your family go to church growing up?
Was there a song from church that still gives you goosebumps?
Did you have a favorite Bible verse or story growing up?
Was there a time your faith really carried you through something hard?
Did your family say grace before meals?
Was there a preacher or pastor who really touched your life?
What's something you pray about most?
What kind of music did your family listen to?
Did anybody in your family play an instrument?
What's a song that takes you right back to being young?
Did your family dance at get-togethers?
What's the best concert or show you ever went to?
Was there a TV show your whole family watched together?
What did you do for fun on a Saturday night?
If you could tell your younger self one thing, what would it be?
What's the best advice anybody ever gave you?
Is there a saying you live by?
What's something you know now that you wish you knew at twenty?
What are you most proud of in your life?
What do you want people to remember about you?
If you could go back and relive one day, which day would it be?
